task_objective: Fix the autosync status strip not appearing for configured games when frontend tracking or settings caches are not initialized at lifecycle time.
tests_added: Updated frontend static tests to require optimistic status publication when settings/tracking are unknown and explicit hide behavior for backend silent skips.
design_decisions: Do not rely solely on frontend tracked game caches to decide whether the strip should appear.
Publish the running strip when tracking/settings are unknown, then hide it if the backend returns auto_sync_disabled, operation_running, unmatched_game, or not_processed.
Changed status listeners to receive full visible state so hide events do not accidentally re-show the strip.
results: Targeted frontend static tests and TypeScript typecheck passed before full validation.
